summary: V5.9 backend + frontend regression PASSED. Backend pytest 10/10 (test_v59_features.py): companies/roles public list (>=8 roles including designer/executor/vgd/rte), companies/stats public dict, companies list with industry+role filters, full company CRUD lifecycle (POST as admin auto-verifies status='verified', GET 200/404, LIST contains it, PATCH unauth -> 401, PATCH as admin updates city, DELETE -> 200, GET after delete -> 404), clients endpoint requires auth (401 anon), full clients CRUD lifecycle (POST/GET/LIST with status+industry filters/PATCH/DELETE all 200), regression: gas-project/phases returns 11 phases (response is {phases:[...]} dict-wrapped), subscribers/types returns 5 types (dict-wrapped {types:[...]}), gas-project public QR endpoint works for gp_7b51a8a17592023e, AI agents POST returns rate_limit dict with all 4 keys (minute_used/minute_limit/day_used/day_limit). Frontend: /verify/gas-project/gp_7b51a8a17592023e renders verify-card publicly with title 'Test branșament gaz Buc', verify-status-draft badge 'PROIECT ÎN LUCRU — neSEMNAT încă'; /verify/gas-project/invalid_pid_xyz correctly shows verify-error; admin login OK; sidebar shows nav-clients + nav-companies; /clients page loads cleanly (clients-page + new-client-btn visible, no errors); /companies page loads cleanly (companies-page + new-company-btn + role-stats badges visible).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~2390 lines and now hosts CRM + companies + clients endpoints inline via api2 router (lines 2236-2340). Recommend extracting /clients/* and /companies/* into clients_routes.py and companies_routes.py modules following the existing gas_project_routes.py / subscribers_routes.py factory pattern.

companies_directory.list_companies hides 'rejected' companies but not soft-deleted ones; there's no soft-delete pattern — DELETE is hard-removal. Consider status='archived' instead so audit history is preserved.

Two CRM-like concepts coexist: /api/clients (per-user legacy CRM in clients_crm.py — user_id scoped) and /api/subscribers (5 types, separate concept). Both have valid use-cases but the distinction must be documented for end users to avoid confusion.
COMPANY_ROLES list (14 entries) is hard-coded in companies_directory.py — consider moving to a config/seed collection so admins can extend without code change.

VerifyGasProject.jsx uses the global api axios instance which carries auth headers; since the endpoint /api/gas-project/{pid}/public is public, this works, but logout state should also work — confirmed via screenshot (no auth) the page rendered correctly. No issue, just noting that the global api interceptor was tolerant.
seed_data_creation: Backend test created+deleted one company (TEST_V59 Proiectanti Gaz SRL, co_e2894468d26a457e) and one client (TEST_V59 Client Popescu Ion, cli_*) — both removed by the lifecycle test. A stale TEST_V59 company left over from a prior partially-failed iteration was also manually cleaned via DELETE /api/companies/{cid}. DB is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V5.9 deliverables fully verified end-to-end. Backend regression at /app/backend/tests/test_v59_features.py (10/10 green). Frontend public verify page at /verify/gas-project/:pid uses /gas-project/{pid}/public endpoint and renders verify-card / verify-error correctly, requires no auth. /clients and /companies pages load cleanly post-login, sidebar nav-clients + nav-companies present. Two gotchas to remember: (1) get_current_user does NOT enforce — it raises 401 — but requests.Session() carries cookies after /api/auth/login so an unauth test MUST use a fresh Session() or explicitly clear cookies. (2) /api/gas-project/phases and /api/subscribers/types return DICT wrappers ({phases:[...]}, {types:[...]}) not bare lists.
rca_of_the_issue: Not applicable — no bugs found. All V5.9 features (clients CRM + companies directory + public QR verify page) work end-to-end.
